case_title: KOHLENBERG&ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING SERVIC VS. OVIDIU CARAVAN

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-11-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-30-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. (BETTY KOHLENBERG - OWNER) <SUBMITTED ON SC-150 FORM> FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOHLENBERG&ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING SERVIC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $943.41 FILED BY KOHLENBERG&ASSOCIATES VOCATIONAL COUNSELING SERVIC AS TO DEFENDANT CARAVAN, OVIDIU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
